name: lookup_patient
description: Look up patient records by phone and/or full name. ALWAYS call this when a caller phone may map to multiple people. Never assume identity when match_count > 1 or requires_disambiguation is true.

phone.description: Caller phone. Prefer from_number when available.

full_name.description: Caller full name used to find or disambiguate patients.

from_number.description: Inbound caller ID from Bolna context {from_number}.
